__NOTOC__
= Orbital Sandbox =
This '''compact''' page links [[Spaceflight|spaceflight 🚀]] with ''café λ'' and 𝌆.
{{Infobox mission
| name = Orbital Sandbox
| target = [[Moon]]
| crew = {{{crew|3}}}
}}
== Highlights ==
* Launch from [[Cape Canaveral]]
** Track [https://example.org/mission live telemetry]
# Verify {{convert|42|km}}
; Status : Nominal <ref name="status">Reviewed in {{CURRENTYEAR}}.</ref>
{| class="wikitable"
|+ Mission facts
! Item !! Value
|-
| Vehicle || ''Aurora''
|-
| Payload || 東京 experiment 🚀
|}
Literal markup: <nowiki>{{not a template}} and [[not a link]]</nowiki>.
Equation: <math>E = mc^2</math>.
<syntaxhighlight lang="python">
message = "Grüße from 𝌆 🚀"
print(message)
</syntaxhighlight>
----
Signed by ~~~~
